shapes.name: TextBox 12
shapes.text: Show the ways your company plans to make money.

shapes.name: TextBox 14
shapes.text: Whether through a graph, timeline, or chart, present the viability of your product or service and tell how your company will operate, make money, and achieve goals.

shapes.name: TextBox 15
shapes.text: If you have plenty of waysto make money, focus on one main method, such as subscription, ads, and transactions.

shapes.name: TextBox 16
shapes.text: Touch up on key metrics here too, such as Life Time Value (LTV) and Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC).
